narrative:
Precinct Laurel (precinct in Hocking County) has 744 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
